assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 3)

Three independent CAH deployment blockers: OOD validation gap, documented alert fatigue, workflow actionability gap. Network-wide contract inappropriate without CAH pilot.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 3)

Same three issues. CAH deployment requires separate validation and workflow assessment.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_008 (Run 3)

Consensus on three issues. Network-wide deployment covering CAHs inappropriate.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_008 (Ensemble, Run 3)

All assessors identify all three issues. Verdict: critique_wins — network-wide CAH deployment inappropriate.
